verses.2: In the day of my trouble I sought the Lord.
verses.3: I remember God, and I groan.
verses.5: I have considered the days of old,
verses.6: I remember my song in the night.
verses.8: Has his loving kindness vanished forever?
verses.9: Has God forgotten to be gracious?
verses.10: Then I thought, “I will appeal to this:
verses.11: I will remember the LORD’s deeds;
verses.12: I will also meditate on all your work,
verses.13: Your way, God, is in the sanctuary.
verses.14: You are the God who does wonders.
verses.15: You have redeemed your people with your arm,
verses.18: The voice of your thunder was in the whirlwind.
verses.19: Your way was through the sea,
verses.20: You led your people like a flock,
